steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to compare the curviness of the two rivers. A successful answer must state which river is curvier — not just define sinuosity or describe one river alone.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: reverses the data — it implies the Luni is the curvier river, but the Embarras has the higher sinuosity ratio. ✗
  • Choice B: directly states that the Embarras River's sinuosity is greater than the Luni's — a clear, accurate comparison. ✓
  • Choice C: only defines sinuosity without comparing the two rivers. ✗
  • Choice D: only defines sinuosity without comparing the two rivers. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
